title: Yuhan's Mega Collection [Flygon, Sylveon, Hydreigon]
description: Three new Mega-Evolutions for Cobblemon, oh my!
body:
**Yuhan's Mega Collection**

If you're like me, you'll agree some Pokemon are sorely lacking mega forms. In this addon, I provide fully featured mega evolutions for three Pokemon. Included are custom animations, unique abilities, and competitive stat spreads as well as some bonus features you might not see elsewhere.

**Mega Flygon Y:** Features a special oriented stat spread, custom ability 'Amplifier' which boosts sound attacks (based on its Pokedex entry), unique animations, and several additional moves to complement the special stat spread.

**Mega Sylveon:** Features a support oriented stat spread, custom ability 'Pixie Guard' which offers additional pivot and boost sweeper potential, unique animations, and a custom Christmas skin.

**Mega Hydreigon:** Features a wall breaker oiented stat spread, custom ability 'Lernean' which provides increasing strength the lower HP falls, unique animations, and a custom animation system to fully animate the ability (including growing heads).

Out of the box is included compatibility with Horret's Mega Addon, and any other addon that simply adds Mega Flygon, as our Flygon is designated Mega Y. This may change in the future, but for now it should mean you can play with your favorite Mega addons. Getting all of this to work took a lot of work, I hope you enjoy what's been made.

Recommended Mods:
- Project Lazuli (Rebalances many Pokemon, including the addition of quiver dance to flygon.)
- Fight or Flight Reborn 
- AlltheMon x Mega Showdown
- Horret's Extended Megas


Credits:
JuanO_204 (Models, Animations, Implementation)
JayBerJabber (Concept Art)
Raguto (Bug Fixes)
Stillet (Models, Animations)
Release (Animations, Sounds)
sckot39 (Bug Fixes, Lernean System)
